title: Better Fire & Light
description: Better Fire & Light is a texture pack that improves fire and light without changing the vanilla game.
body:
Better Fire & Light is a texture pack that adds improved textures
such as for :


torches


campfire


redstone torches


etc.


The goal of this pack is to slightly enhance the visual appearance of light sources
while keeping a style that fits well with the original game.


The changes are simple but noticeable, making fire and light feel a bit more alive
and immersive without being too different from vanilla.


All textures have been adjusted to look cleaner and more detailed,
with a better glow effect and smoother visuals overall.


It is designed to work well in any world,
whether you are building, exploring, or playing survival.


If you'd like to support me, you can download and follow it.


This is my first texture pack, and a big thank you
to everyone who has supported me by


downloading it.


I also plan to update the pack with more improvements
and possibly new textures in the future.
